article_id: 133. Pensions, etc. to be charged on Consolidated Fund
text_snippet: Awards granted under any law for the time being in force in Jamaica in respect of the public service shall be charged on and paid out of the Consolidated Fund.

There shall be a Parliament of Jamaica which shall consist of Her Majesty, a Senate and a House of Representatives.
